title: capitanopsis oreophila
intro: Capitanopsis oreophila, also known as the mountain rosemary, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the Lamiaceae family, native to the mountainous regions of southwestern North America. The medicinal properties of Capitanopsis oreophila have been traditionally used to treat various ailments, including digestive issues, and its essential oils are known to possess antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant is rich in antioxidants and has been found to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. Capitanopsis oreophila can be prepared as a tea, infused oil, or added to herbal remedies to harness its medicinal properties.
